items.title: Protected route rejects unauthenticated and non-super-admin callers
items.precondition: Run the receipts route tests with synthetic auth fixtures.
steps: Request the endpoint without an access token.
Request the endpoint with an authenticated non-super-admin user.
items.expected: The requests return 401 and 403 respectively, and the report service is not called.
items.evidence: src/__tests__/receipts-report-route.test.ts passed in the 41-test focused run and the 379-test full suite.
items.notes: The route uses the existing authenticateToken and superAdminMiddleware boundary.

items.title: Boundary validation rejects invalid organization and date inputs
items.precondition: Run the receipts route tests against the imported Express app.
steps: Request malformed and inverted date ranges.
items.expected: Every invalid request returns 400 without invoking report orchestration.
items.notes: Dates use an inclusive YYYY-MM-DD contract converted to a half-open UTC range.

items.title: Valid requests return the canonical organization-scoped report
items.precondition: Use the synthetic super-admin request and mocked organization-scoped service result.
steps: Request the endpoint with a valid organization id and date range.
Inspect the response envelope and exact service arguments.
items.expected: The response is canonical and the organization/date arguments match the validated request.
items.evidence: src/__tests__/receipts-report-route.test.ts passed canonical success, error, and argument assertions.

items.title: Attributable GBP work comes only from the published work ledger
items.precondition: Run model and service tests with synthetic published, draft, out-of-period, and cross-tenant rows.
steps: Aggregate local posts and review replies for the requested organization and period.
Compare included rows with excluded synced or non-published activity.
items.expected: Only published local_post and review_reply gbp_work_items in the tenant/date boundary contribute.
items.evidence: src/__tests__/receipts-report-model.test.ts and receipts-report-service.test.ts passed published-only and tenant-scope cases.
items.notes: No gbp_local_posts or synced review reply flags are queried.

items.title: Ranking movement uses explicit search positions and observation timestamps
items.precondition: Run model and service tests with multiple ranking observations and search-result fixtures.
steps: Load completed, successful search_position observations for the period.
Inspect first, last, best, worst, and latest competitor context.
items.expected: The report preserves search_position semantics, real search_checked_at timestamps, and deterministic latest context.
items.evidence: src/__tests__/receipts-report-model.test.ts and receipts-report-service.test.ts passed ranking and competitor cases.
items.notes: Read-only dev EXPLAIN completed at estimated cost 76.69; future index work remains separate.

items.title: Rybbit distinguishes real zero from unavailable states
items.precondition: Run receipts-period-users tests with mocked project lookup and fetch responses.
steps: Exercise missing connection, malformed payload, request failure, and timeout paths.
items.expected: Zero returns ok with users 0; missing config returns not_connected; failures return source_unavailable.
items.evidence: src/__tests__/receipts-period-users.test.ts passed all Rybbit success and failure-state cases.
items.notes: The bounded timeout is limited to the new receipts-specific request.

items.title: Empty supported activity remains honest
items.precondition: Run service tests with an existing organization, empty location activity, and unavailable optional sources.
steps: Generate a report with no attributable activity.
Inspect totals, ranking context, and optional-source states.
items.expected: The report returns supported zeros and explicit null or unavailable states without claiming work.
items.evidence: src/__tests__/receipts-report-service.test.ts passed empty, partial-source, and deterministic-total cases.
items.notes: Unsupported replacement values remain null and ratesStaked remains false.
